---
title: "The Rev. J. J. Halcombe"
---

## The Rev. J. J. Halcombe

### Description

editor of <i>Mission Life</i>

### Biography

He was editorial secretary to the SPCK, and published a biography of Bishop Mackenzie in 1870.

### Letters

- Letter from  Novr 9th 1872
- Letter from March 27th 1867

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
